by the same trust-weighted attestation system used for      SkillChain skill validation. TRUST tokens are minted from a dedicated      Life Protocol emission pool. Key mechanics:   - Daily caps per category per user (prevents grinding)   - Diminishing returns within a day (exponential decay)   - Diversity bonus for 3+ categories in a day (1.2x)   - Streak bonuses for consecutive daily activity (7d=1.1x, 30d=1.3x, 90d=1.5x)   - Trust-gated attestation (attestors must have trust >= 0.40)   - Configurable reward rates per category (governance-controlled) Patent Family B: Runtime governance of learning/adaptive systems.","errors":{"EnforcedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is paused."}],"ExpectedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is not paused."}],"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. returns._0: days The number of consecutive active days.

params._dailyEmissionCap: Maximum TRUST that can be minted per day via Life Protocol.

params.proofId: The proof to check for expiry.

returns.activeCategories: Number of distinct categories with activity.

returns._0: multiplier The streak multiplier in WAD (1e18 = 1.0x).

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.proofHash: SHA-256 hash of the proof data (sensor data, git commit, quiz score, etc.).

returns.proofId: The ID of the submitted proof.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

DECAY_FACTOR().notice: Diminishing returns decay factor per subsequent activity (0.7x per additional).

DIVERSITY_BONUS().notice: Diversity bonus multiplier when 3+ categories active in a day (1.2x in WAD).

DIVERSITY_THRESHOLD().notice: Minimum categories required to trigger diversity bonus.

MAX_DAILY_ACTIVITIES().notice: Maximum activities per category per day before full cutoff.

MIN_ATTESTOR_TRUST().notice: Minimum trust score required to attest proofs (0.40 in WAD).

WAD().notice: WAD precision (1e18) used for fixed-point arithmetic.

attestProof(uint256).notice: Attest a submitted proof. Only nodes with trust >= 0.40 may attest.         When the attestation threshold is met, the reward is minted.

attestationWindow().notice: Attestation window duration (proofs expire after this).

consecutiveDaysOf(address).notice: Get the current consecutive-day streak for a user.

dailyEmissionCap().notice: Global daily emission cap for Life Protocol rewards.

emissionDay().notice: The day number for todayEmitted tracking.

expireProof(uint256).notice: Mark expired proofs. Anyone can call to clean up.

getDailyActivity(address).notice: Get a user's daily activity summary for today.

getEmissionStatus().notice: Get the current day's emission usage.

getStreakMultiplier(address).notice: Calculate the streak multiplier for a user (WAD).

hasAttested(uint256,address).notice: Mapping: proofId => attestor address => has attested.

pause().notice: Pause the contract in case of emergency.

rejectProof(uint256).notice: Reject a proof. Only owner (governance) can reject.

setCategoryConfig(uint8,uint256,uint256,.notice: Update reward configuration for a category.

setDailyEmissionCap(uint256).notice: Update the global daily emission cap.

submitProof(uint8,bytes32).notice: Submit a proof of activity for reward consideration.

todayEmitted().notice: Total TRUST minted today via Life Protocol.
